ai_technologies.name: AI agents

summary: The video explores the integration of AI and Autodesk technologies, such as APS and Revit, to automate compliance checks in technical room design for large infrastructure projects. It showcases how Agis uses these tools to streamline BIM processes by automating validation and coordination tasks, while AI strategies aid in monitoring and proposing fixes. The emphasis is on augmenting human expertise with AI to enhance construction compliance verification.
